name: Golph Co.
about: Golph Co. is a family-owned, indoor golf practice facility located in Carrollton, Georgia. The establishment provides a versatile environment for new golfers, average players, and even professional golfers to improve their skills. The facility offers a range of services including simulator bay rentals, club repair and maintenance, and lessons for all skill levels. It is designed for various use cases, from a quick lunchtime session to an evening with friends on a virtual international golf course, or getting clubs professionally fitted and repaired.
why_golfers_like_it: Family-owned, welcoming atmosphere for all skill levels
Professional club fitting and repair services by knowledgeable staff
Convenient indoor facility for practice and play in any weather

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site kitchen mentioned. BYOB policy not specified.
No bar or alcohol service mentioned.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs. The facility also offers club repair, re-gripping, re-shafting, shaft fittings, custom builds, and options to buy or sell clubs through their Custom Shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided regarding an on-site kitchen or food service. The policy on bringing outside food and drinks is not specified on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time required to complete 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as being for every individual to enjoy the game of golf, and services are offered for 'golfers of all skill levels,' which includes juniors and youth.
